name: track_task_in_linear
description: Track a high-level TASK execution or project item as a Linear issue or milestone using ONLY the desired effect: task name or title + optional description/details. No need to recall save_issue fields or separate create + comment. The TASK deduces team/project (or uses provided), calls grok_com_linear__save_issue (or save_milestone), attaches steps/log as description or follow-up save_comment, sets labels like 'taskmaster', priority etc. Reusable for any automated flow completion reporting.

title.description: Issue title, e.g. 'Completed connect_domain for example.com' or 'Forge and publish new foo connector'

description.description: Markdown body. Can include {{task_steps}} or full execution log. Use literal newlines.

team.description: Linear team name/id, defaults to primary or 'me' context

milestone.description: Optional milestone name to associate or create via save_milestone

steps.description: Map TASK params to Linear fields. If milestone provided and not exist, first call grok_com_linear__save_milestone.
Invoke grok_com_linear__save_issue with title, description, team, project, labels, priority, state, milestone. Real creation/update in Linear. Returns the issue id/key.
If detailed steps from original TASK run available, use grok_com_linear__save_comment with issueId + body containing the log. Or create document via save_document.
Call grok_com_linear__list_issues or get_issue using the returned id to confirm tracking entry exists with correct data.

example_invocation: {track_task_in_linear; title=Published new connector via TASKs; description=Full run of forge_new_connector + publish...; labels=["automation"]; state=Done}
symbiotic: Perfect follow-up to execute_task, forge_new_connector, publish_connector_to_github.
